chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Const. Petition No. D – 4340 of 2020 Date Order with signature of Judge Disposed of Matter: 1. For orders on Misc. No.24442/2020 (U/A): 2. For orders on Misc. No.24443/2020 (U/S 151 CPC): 13.11.2020: Mr. Altamash Faisal Arab, advocate for the petitioner............. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Through this application, petitioner has prayed that the consolidated judgment pronounced in the present petition and other connected matters on 12.10.2020 be suspended as the petitioner in the present petition intends to challenge the same before the Hon’ble Supreme Court. The ground urged in support of this application is that the petitioner is suffering from severe cataract and there is a risk that his said ailment may convert into glaucoma. It is contended that due to his above condition, the petitioner is not in a position to vacate the subject quarter immediately. Medical reports, etc. have been filed by the petitioner in support of his above contention. It may be observed that the judgment was pronounced on 12.10.2020, but the petitioner has not challenged the same up till now. However, as the limitation for filing Civil Petition for Leave to Appeal before the Hon’ble Supreme Court has not yet expired and the petitioner is reportedly not in a position to vacate the subject quarter immediately, operation of the impugned judgment dated 12.10.2020 is suspended till 30.11.2020 only to the extent of the present petitioner and the quarter which is the subject matter of the present petition. The application stands disposed of in the above terms with no order as to costs. J U D G E J U D G E
